name: HANDI MART
content: Diesel is incredibly cheap at HANDI MART. The staff is also very friendly, especially to people driving back from a concert in Atlanta at 2 AM, clearly cross dressing, and wearing smudged eyeliner. I am thoroughly surprised neither me nor my friend did not get shot, let alone that the person working the graveyard shift would be friendly to us. Thank you, unknown lady working the graveyard shift at the HANDI MART in Menlo!
